name: google-calendar-sa
description: Access Google Calendar using a service account with domain-wide delegation. See all events for any user in your Google Workspace without per-user OAuth login.

metadata.short_description: Access Google Calendar using a service account with domain-wide delegation.
metadata.mesh_description: The Google Calendar Service Account MCP provides server-to-server access to Google Calendar using a Google Workspace service account with domain-wide delegation. Unlike the OAuth-based MCP, this variant requires no per-user login — it authenticates using a service account JSON key and impersonates a target user to access their calendar. Tokens are generated and refreshed automatically. Ideal for organization-wide calendar visibility, automated scheduling, and internal tools that need to read all meetings for a shared account.
